summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: (1) Wedding Countdown page, (2) WebSocket real-time chat, (3) Admin countdown link sharing. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All new frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/countdown/EULF18 - returns event_name='Emma & James', wedding_date, venue, countdown, guests_joined=3, matches_made=3
Backend: GET /api/countdown/eulf18 (lowercase) - correctly resolves to EULF18
Backend: POST /api/chat/send - creates message and returns it with id, match_id, sender_id, content, created_at
Backend: POST /api/chat/send - message persists and appears in GET /api/chat/{match_id}
Backend: POST /api/chat/send to invalid match_id - returns 403
Backend: WebSocket /ws/chat/{match_id}?token={token} - connection manager implemented with JWT auth
Backend: All 17 previous API tests still passing
Frontend: Countdown page at /countdown/EULF18 - shows 'Emma & James', countdown digits (95d 02h 22m 19s), 3 guests joined, 3 matches made
Frontend: Countdown page shows 'Join with Code EULF18' button
Frontend: Countdown page with invalid code shows 'Event Not Found' error state with 'Go Home' button
Frontend: Chat page loads with WebSocket connection indicator (bg-green-500 class present)
Frontend: Chat page message input and send button functional
Frontend: Message sent via chat appears in conversation
Frontend: Admin dashboard (with event) shows 'Copy shareable countdown link' button below event code
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows event stats: 3 single guests, 3 matches made
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows Live Activity with recent matches (Marcus & Alice, Alice & Sophie, Marcus & Sophie)
seed_data_creation: Updated event host password to demo123 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: (1) Countdown page at /countdown/:eventCode is public (no auth), shows live timer that updates every second, guest/match stats, and 'Join with Code' button. (2) WebSocket chat implemented at /ws/chat/{match_id}?token={token} with JWT auth via query param - messages sent via POST /api/chat/send are broadcast to connected clients. Frontend shows green dot indicator when WS connected. (3) Admin dashboard shows 'Copy shareable countdown link' below event code when host has an event.

notes.websocket_behavior: WebSocket may show brief 'closed before established' console error during rapid navigation - this is expected; the reconnection logic handles it. Green indicator shows when connected.
notes.countdown_public: The /api/countdown/{event_code} endpoint is PUBLIC - no auth required. Frontend route /countdown/:eventCode is also public.
notes.admin_countdown_link: The 'Copy shareable countdown link' button only appears after host has created an event (not visible for hosts who haven't paid/created event yet)
